/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/icu4c@77/lib CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/EdgeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/VideoPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/NetworkClient.cpp.o -o edge   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib/libSDL2main.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib/libavformat.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib/libavcodec.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib/libswscale.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib/libavutil.dylib
